basics.name: Falconiere R. Barbosa
basics.label: Software Engineer | Reactjs | ReactNative | Nodejs
basics.summary: Hello, I'm Falconiere R. Barbosa, a seasoned software developer boasting over eight years of dedicated experience in the dynamic realms of web and mobile development. My journey has led me through diverse technologies and frameworks, with a strong focus on React Native, React.js, and Node.js. While I've honed my skills primarily in mobile front-end development with a deep appreciation for UX/UI, my background includes substantial back-end development expertise. I'm passionate about crafting exceptional digital experiences and have a proven track record of turning ideas into reality.

work.name: Gigpro
work.summary:
Gigpro is a dynamic company at the forefront of the gig economy, bridging the gap between nearly 10,000 skilled professionals, known as "Pros," and a network of 1,500+ businesses, facilitating the execution of over 130,000 work shifts.

Responsibilities:

=> Spearheaded the development and continual enhancement of innovative features, ensuring the seamless operation of the Gigpro platform.

=> Created comprehensive documentation, streamlining the onboarding process for technical and non-technical stakeholders.

=> Actively collaborated with cross-functional teams within the organization, leveraging expertise as a developer to foster a culture of teamwork and technical excellence.

Key Technologies Utilized:

=> Frontend: Leveraged Next.js and React.js to craft a user-friendly and responsive interface, enhancing the overall user experience.
=> UI Design: Utilized Tailwind CSS to create visually appealing and modern user interfaces.
=> Backend: Employed Python and PostgreSQL to build a robust and scalable backend infrastructure.
=> Mobile App Development: Contributed to the development of React Native applications, extending.

work.name: gsquad
work.summary:
I worked for Mission as a frontend developer engineer using reactjs, styled-component, and RestAPI.

=> Develop frontend website architecture with ReactJs and Redux
=> Write and maintain high and well-documented code
=> Translate business requirements for coding and solve issues discovered throughout the software release cycle from development to production  

Technologies:  Javascript, HTML, CSS/SASS,  Reactjs, Styled-Components, Jest, docker, git

work.name: FK TECH SRL
work.summary:
I worked as a full-stack engineer at FK TECH SRL, and I have collaborated on different projects.

=> Developed frontend, backend, and mobile apps 
=> Wrote and maintained apps with highly well-documented code
=> Translating business requirements for code and solving issues discovered throughout the software release cycle from development to production  
=> Developed CI/CD width GitLab

Technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, ReactJs, React Native, PHP, NodeJs, TypeScript, Linux, MySQL, MongoDB, Python, CI/CD with Gitlab, PHPUnit, jest, Nginx, docker, GraphQl, scrum, git.

work.name: WE ARE FIERA
work.summary:
I worked here as a web programmer in the development of themes for WordPress

=> Created and maintained web applications frontend and backend
=> Planning the architecture of all high-level and low-level 

Technologies: PHP, javascript, HTML, CSS, WordPress, Prestashop, bootstrap

work.name: Extendeal
work.summary:
At Extendeal (a start-up) I worked as a full-stack developer by using the vuejs in the first version of the product and reactjs in the second version, most of my tasks were about UI/X, but sometimes  I had to resolve backend issues by using the PHP. The product was about e-commerce.

Technologies:  Javascript,  Vuejs, Riotjs, Reactjs, HTML, CSS, Linux, Mysql, MongoDB, git

work.name: Thet Studio - Web design & social media
work.summary:
At ThetStudio, I worked as a full-stack developer building simple and complex interfaces with the perfect-pixel concept for ads banners, institutional and e-commerce web sites. I also was responsible for building mobile applications by using Ionic as cross-platform at other times natively, I mean, native apps by swift/android.

Technologies : Javascript,CSS, HTML, Sass, BootStrap, Angular, Ionic, Cordova, Onsenui, Java, Swift, linux, PHP, Nodejs, Expressjs, MySQL, MongoDB

volunteer.organization: Gobierno de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires
volunteer.summary:
Participé del  BA Hackton 2015 (en Buenos Aires Argentina) como programador voluntário.
link do evento: https://hackdash.org/dashboards/bahktn2015

references.name: Filipe Colaquecez
references.reference: Falconiere epitomizes dedication and professionalism in every aspect of his work. Diligent, hardworking, and truly adept in his field, he possesses extensive expertise across multiple domains. As a remarkably comprehensive professional, Falconiere consistently extends his support to the entire team, displaying an unwavering commitment to his responsibilities. His deliverables are marked by a blend of quality and efficiency, consistently meeting requirements with precision and swiftness. Without a shadow of a doubt, I wholeheartedly endorse Falconiere as both a skilled technician and an exceptional individual.

references.name: Matias Romano
references.reference:
Tuve la suerte de conocer a Falconiere en mi gestión en Extendeal, Como desarrollador Front y Backend tuvo la difícil tarea de hacer que los diseños llegaran a la experiencia web de nuestros clientes. Y puedo decir que se traspiro bastante. "Falco" es una persona muy aplicada detallista con gran responsabilidad y orden, 
Lo recomiendo y espero sepan valorar su capacidades.

references.name: Cristian Mari
references.reference:
Falco es un programador como se debe, respetuoso con argumentos solidos, su seguimiento ayuda compañerismo son gigantes igualados a sus conocimientos en la tecnologias actuales y venideras,
tiene un amor por el codigo y el aprendisaje poco visto como colega muy agradecido de haber podido trabajar a su lado discutir y aprender :)

references.name: Carlos Alvarez Lopez
references.reference: He trabajado con Falconiere en varios proyectos, es la clase de persona con quien deseas trabajar, conoces ampliamente sobre buenas practicas y arquitectura, siempre esta abierto a sugerencias y modificaciones, además, cuenta con la facilidad de darse entender, es muy bueno enseñando a los demás y transmitiendo lo que hace. Sin duda, un gran profesional.

references.name: Roberto Zamora, Web UI Developer
references.reference: Agradezco mucho la oportunidad de haber trabajado con Falconiere, es excelente desarrollador y aún mejor como persona, responsable, inteligente, apasionado. Tiene grandes conocimientos técnicos sobre desarrollo, y una facilidad de aprendizaje en nuevas tecnologías con una rapidez tremenda. Es un gran Team Leader, sabe manejar los tiempos y los recursos de un equipo. Admiro mucho su responsabilidad y calidad humana. Recomendadisimo!!
